title: Research Question Method Navigator
creator: Dan McCreary
subject: Marketing Research
Research Methods
Evidence Classification
description: Classify marketing questions by customer or market scope and qualitative or quantitative evidence, with immediate explanatory feedback.

learningObjectives: Classify a marketing question by research scope and evidence type, then justify the selected method.

keyQuestions: What evidence would answer this question?
commonMisconceptions: Every research question has exactly one defensible method.
assessmentOpportunities: Ten classification scenarios with immediate feedback.
